page: Amazon Web Services r8in.metal-96xl is a memory-optimized bare-metal server instance featuring Intel x86_64 processors. It is equipped with 192 physical cores and 384 virtual CPUs with hyperthreading enabled at 2.0 threads per core. The dedicated processors operate at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz.

The server is configured with 3072.0 GB of system memory, providing 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and is optimized for Amazon Elastic Block Store. The network architecture delivers a baseline bandwidth of 300 Gbps. No GPUs are bundled with this configuration.

Given its bare-metal architecture and high resource density, the r8in.metal-96xl offers qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale enterprise applications requiring direct hardware access without virtualization overhead. The high memory-to-vCPU ratio and substantial network throughput make it suitable for large in-memory databases, memory-intensive enterprise resource planning systems, and high-performance computing workloads.
description: The Amazon Web Services r8in.metal-96xl is a memory-optimized bare-metal server designed for resource-intensive enterprise workloads. Powered by Intel x86_64 processors, the system features 192 physical cores and 384 dedicated vCPUs operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. It is equipped with 3072.0 GB of system memory, yielding a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage, relying on network-attached storage, but is optimized for high-speed EBS performance. Networking capabilities include a baseline bandwidth of 300 Gbps. With no integrated GPUs, this bare-metal configuration is engineered to eliminate virtualization overhead, offering high resource density and qualitative cost efficiency for large-scale deployments. It is suited for large in-memory databases, enterprise applications, and memory-heavy data processing tasks.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8in.metal-96xl is a memory-optimized bare-metal server featuring 384 vCPUs, 3072 GB of RAM, and 300 Gbps network bandwidth for large-scale enterprise workloads.

tagline: A high-density bare-metal platform featuring three terabytes of memory and high-speed networking for demanding enterprise database workloads.
